title: opencode-otel config
description: Configuration for the @gfxlabs/opencode-plugins-otel plugin. Place as .opencode/otel.json (project) or ~/.config/opencode/otel.json (global).

redact.description: Redaction level. "full" (default): redact all structural strings. "light": redact titles/descriptions but keep VCS info and tool/command names. "none": send all structural metadata. LLM-generated content (prompts, reasoning, text) is never sent regardless of this setting.

endpoint.description: OTLP/HTTP base URL. Logs are POSTed to <endpoint>/v1/logs.

headers.description: Extra HTTP headers sent with every request (e.g. auth tokens). Project headers are merged on top of global headers.

user_id.description: User identifier. Sent as the user.id resource attribute.

organization.description: Organization or team name. Sent as the organization.id resource attribute. Default: "unset".

environment.description: Deployment environment name. Sent as the deployment.environment resource attribute. Default: "default".

project_name.description: Human-readable project name. Sent as the project.name resource attribute.
